content: TASK-046 checkpoint done under TASK-010: public delivery/security docs and v0.1 acceptance matrix added. README/SYNTAX updated to current delivery, zone-as-add-info, routing validation, 3D, and security constraints. package.json now packs dist plus public docs/specs/examples while excluding internal docs/aof. Verification: npm run build, git diff --check, npm pack --dry-run. Next: continue TASK-010 by either verifying the actual published CDN URL after release candidate or resolving the final spec wording/product decision for zone base view vs Add info overlay. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
